name: Hero Product Cut-Out
usage: Floats in the center of the hero section over the atmospheric background. This is the sharpest element on screen — the contrast between the soft dreamy background and the razor-sharp product is what creates the premium feel. Will be extracted from solid cream background and placed on transparent background. Stat blobs with organic shapes float on either side.
prompt: Ultra-sharp studio product photograph of a premium clear PET supplement shot bottle with thick opaque golden-yellow liquid visible inside and a sealed pristine dosing cap. The bottle is perfectly centered with a subtle 5-degree tilt to the right. Shot against a solid warm cream background (#FFFDF7) for clean extraction. The thick golden-yellow liquid is opaque and dense, not see-through. It has the deep color of fresh turmeric-ginger juice. The cap is clean and sealed, showing the twist mechanism. No visible shadow on the background to keep extraction clean. Dual softbox studio lighting renders every detail razor-sharp — bottle surface, liquid color, cap texture. The bottle is the sole object in frame, photographed at the level of premium product isolation you would see from Apple or Aesop.

scene.background: solid warm cream (#FFFDF7), perfectly uniform, no gradient

subject.description: premium clear PET supplement shot bottle, 90ml size, thick opaque golden-yellow liquid visible through clear plastic, sealed dosing cap on top, clean minimal label
subject.position: perfectly centered with generous empty cream space on all sides, bottle should not approach the frame edges
subject.angle: straight-on with subtle 5-degree tilt to the right

camera.depth_of_field: deep, entire bottle in tack-sharp focus from cap to base

lighting.type: dual studio softbox, clean and bright
lighting.direction: front-angled from both sides, slight key light from upper left
lighting.shadows: minimal to none, no visible shadow on the cream background to keep extraction clean

style: premium product photography, razor-sharp focus, Apple-level product isolation, Aesop aesthetic
negative: no background objects, no text overlays, no blur, no humans, no gradient background, no harsh reflections, no secondary objects, no shadows on background, no objects touching or near frame edges
